outcome_definition: fulltime = 1 if uhrswork >= 35 hours per week, else 0
sample_selection: Not a citizen (citizen in [3, 5] - not a citizen or citizenship status not reported)
Non-missing usual hours worked per week (uhrswork > 0)
treatment_definition: post_daca = 1 if year >= 2013 (post-DACA implementation in June 2012), else 0
